title: Barrel & Bullet After Session 1
summary: The opening briefing is complete, the bank job is accepted, and the crew is ready to leave planning mode and push toward the bank.
notes: The party left with useful bank intel and a convincing forged Mugland vault order. Scavenger health shots and the fungal angle were noticed but stayed in the background, leaving the saloon available as a rumor hub instead of the main objective.
